description_long: This is a modern multi-story house situated along a palm-lined street with a sidewalk and adjacent road. The building features a flat roof, large rectangular windows arranged in vertical strips, and a dark facade with lighter accent panels. The front entryway is recessed, accessible by a set of steps, and flanked by landscaping elements. Vehicles are parked along the street, and the property is bordered by a row of evenly spaced palm trees. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with metal railings and trim visible on balconies and the roof.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and a dark facade, set along a palm-lined urban street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, landscaping, and the full row of palm trees along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical window strips, flat roof, and the building's depth relative to the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, rooftop features, and the alignment of palm trees and vehicles along the road.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's side elevation, window arrangement, and the continuation of the sidewalk and street.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, minimal overhang, and landscaped flanking elements
